segments.text: After these things, Jesus was walking in Galilee, for he wouldn’t walk in Judea, because the Jews sought to kill him.
Now the feast of the Jews, the Feast of Booths, was at hand.
His brothers therefore said to him,
Depart from here and go into Judea, that your disciples also may see your works which you do.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: For no one does anything in secret while he seeks to be known openly. If you do these things, reveal yourself to the world.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: For even his brothers didn’t believe in him.
Jesus therefore said to them,
My time has not yet come, but your time is always ready.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: The world can’t hate you, but it hates me, because I testify about it, that its works are evil.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: You go up to the feast. I am not yet going up to this feast, because my time is not yet fulfilled.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Having said these things to them, he stayed in Galilee.
But when his brothers had gone up to the feast, then he also went up, not publicly, but as it were in secret.
The Jews therefore sought him at the feast, and said,
Where is he?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: There was much murmuring among the multitudes concerning him. Some said,
He is a good man.
segments.speaker: Some

segments.text: Others said,
Not so, but he leads the multitude astray.
segments.speaker: Others

segments.text: Yet no one spoke openly of him for fear of the Jews.
But when it was now the middle of the feast, Jesus went up into the temple and taught.
The Jews therefore marveled, saying,
How does this man know letters, having never been educated?
segments.speaker: Others

segments.text: Jesus therefore answered them,
My teaching is not mine, but his who sent me.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: If anyone desires to do his will, he will know about the teaching, whether it is from God or if I am speaking from myself.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: He who speaks from himself seeks his own glory, but he who seeks the glory of him who sent him is true, and no unrighteousness is in him.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Didn’t Moses give you the law, and yet none of you keeps the law? Why do you seek to kill me?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: The multitude answered,
You have a demon! Who seeks to kill you?
segments.speaker: The multitude

segments.text: Jesus answered them,
I did one work and you all marvel because of it.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Moses has given you circumcision (not that it is of Moses, but of the fathers), and on the Sabbath you circumcise a boy.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: If a boy receives circumcision on the Sabbath, that the law of Moses may not be broken, are you angry with me because I made a man completely healthy on the Sabbath?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Don’t judge according to appearance, but judge righteous judgment.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Therefore some of them of Jerusalem said,
Isn’t this he whom they seek to kill?
segments.speaker: some of them of Jerusalem

segments.text: Behold, he speaks openly, and they say nothing to him. Can it be that the rulers indeed know that this is truly the Christ?
segments.speaker: some of them of Jerusalem

segments.text: However, we know where this man comes from, but when the Christ comes, no one will know where he comes from.
segments.speaker: some of them of Jerusalem

segments.text: Jesus therefore cried out in the temple, teaching and saying,
You both know me, and know where I am from. I have not come of myself, but he who sent me is true, whom you don’t know.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: I know him, because I am from him, and he sent me.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: They sought therefore to take him; but no one laid a hand on him, because his hour had not yet come.
But of the multitude, many believed in him. They said,
When the Christ comes, he won’t do more signs than those which this man has done, will he?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: The Pharisees heard the multitude murmuring these things concerning him, and the chief priests and the Pharisees sent officers to arrest him.
Then Jesus said,
I will be with you a little while longer, then I go to him who sent me.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: You will seek me and won’t find me. You can’t come where I am.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: The Jews therefore said among themselves,
Where will this man go that we won’t find him? Will he go to the Dispersion among the Greeks and teach the Greeks?
segments.speaker: The Jews therefore

segments.text: What is this word that he said,‘You will seek me, and won’t find me;’and‘Where I am, you can’t come’?
segments.speaker: The Jews therefore

segments.text: Now on the last and greatest day of the feast, Jesus stood and cried out,
If anyone is thirsty, let him come to me and drink!
segments.speaker: The Jews therefore

segments.text: He who believes in me, as the Scripture has said, from within him will flow rivers of living water.
segments.speaker: The Jews therefore

segments.text: But he said this about the Spirit, which those believing in him were to receive. For the Holy Spirit was not yet given, because Jesus wasn’t yet glorified.
Many of the multitude therefore, when they heard these words, said,
This is truly the prophet.
segments.speaker: The Jews therefore

segments.text: Others said,
This is the Christ.
segments.speaker: Others

segments.text: But some said,
What, does the Christ come out of Galilee?
segments.speaker: some

segments.text: Hasn’t the Scripture said that the Christ comes of the offspring of David, and from Bethlehem, the village where David was?
segments.speaker: some

segments.text: So a division arose in the multitude because of him.
Some of them would have arrested him, but no one laid hands on him.
The officers therefore came to the chief priests and Pharisees; and they said to them,
Why didn’t you bring him?
segments.speaker: some

segments.text: The officers answered,
No man ever spoke like this man!
segments.speaker: The officers

segments.text: The Pharisees therefore answered them,
You aren’t also led astray, are you?
segments.speaker: The Pharisees therefore

segments.text: Have any of the rulers or any of the Pharisees believed in him?
segments.speaker: The Pharisees therefore

segments.text: But this multitude that doesn’t know the law is cursed.
segments.speaker: The Pharisees therefore

segments.text: Nicodemus (he who came to him by night, being one of them) said to them,
Does our law judge a man unless it first hears from him personally and knows what he does?
segments.speaker: The Pharisees therefore

segments.text: They answered him,
Are you also from Galilee? Search and see that no prophet has arisen out of Galilee.
segments.speaker: The Pharisees therefore

segments.text: Everyone went to his own house,
